metadata.name: Faculty Needs Help Setting Up LMS Gradebook

description: A faculty member needs assistance setting up the weighted categories for their course gradebook in the LMS.

nodes.task_description: Identify the faculty member and the course.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the faculty member's identity and course shell.

nodes.task_description: Access the LMS as a support user to view the course.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully gains view-only access to the course's LMS page.

nodes.task_description: Walk the faculty member through the steps to create weighted grade categories (e.g., Assignments 40%, Midterm 30%, Final 30%).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides clear, step-by-step guidance, resulting in a correctly configured gradebook.
